name: 05-12-tavern-doorway-ritual-mvp
title: Tavern Doorway Ritual MVP
description: 把 /tavern/:id 首屏从直接聊天框改成可沟通酒馆的进门仪式：真实坐标门牌、NPC 正在接待、第一句招呼和一键填入打招呼，不改 Schema/API。
scope: frontend tavern visitor entry ritual; no backend/schema/API changes
creator: lijin
notes: Completed Tavern Doorway Ritual MVP for /tavern/:id. The visitor workbench now exposes a compact door-entry ritual with real-coordinate doorway copy, host NPC greeting/status, and CTA that switches to private NPC chat and fills/focuses the composer without auto-sending. Added source regression coverage and Playwright desktop/mobile evidence. No backend, schema, token/payment, ranking, social, or map-navigation changes.
